nodes.label: AI as literature synthesis accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: AI can more quickly skim through many literature results than would be possible by a single researcher

nodes.label: AI as initial direction-finder for complex analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI as final conclusive analysis tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI is good at coming up with an experimental design and I have used it for that in the past but most of my research has budget/time/specimen limits so the 'ideal' design isn't always viable

nodes.label: AI verifiability through source cross-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I would make a list of the values provided and go through the sources provided by AI and verify that they were those exact parameters

nodes.label: AI as causal inference engine from large datasets

nodes.grounding_span: I would love for it to be able to draw unique conclusions based on large datasets
